domain.name: coding_testgen
domain.description: Coding & test generation (use case #5). A CodeGenAgent grounds on a WorkItem + its Repository context, drafts a code change, and generates a covering test suite. It never merges to the main branch directly — it PROPOSES a ChangeProposal + TestSuite, which the OpenPullRequest service turns into a PullRequest. The PR review IS the approval workflow: a human reviewer must approve/merge before the change lands. Every action is audited. The bounded action space the agent proposes (draft-change | generate-tests | open-pull-request) + the human-at-the-write-step (the PR gate) is what makes it ship, not just reason.

capabilities.name: AssignWorkItem
capabilities.note: Developer intake — assigns a work item (bug/feature/chore) against a repository and kicks off the coding/test-gen flow.

capabilities.name: DraftChange
capabilities.note: THE AGENT. Grounds on the WorkItem + Repository context (native retrieval tool over the repo/tree), drafts a code change and generates a covering TestSuite, and PROPOSES a ChangeProposal (draft-change | generate-tests | open-pull-request) with a RiskTier. It never merges to main directly — it writes a ChangeProposal + TestSuite and proposes.

capabilities.name: OpenPullRequest
capabilities.note: The bounded WRITE that turns an approved ChangeProposal into a PullRequest against the repo (source branch → default branch), audited. Called by the workflow after the draft/tests are ready; the PR itself is the human gate.

capabilities.name: RecordReview
capabilities.note: The other bounded write: record a reviewer's verdict (approve | request-changes | comment) on the PullRequest and set its ReviewState, audited. Merge only proceeds on approve.

capabilities.name: TestGenWorkflow
capabilities.note: HITL via OutSystems BPT: on WorkItemAssigned the workflow runs the CodeGenAgent to draft a ChangeProposal, then to generate a covering TestSuite; it then calls OpenPullRequest to raise the PR and HOLDS at a Human Approval activity — the PullRequest review — until a reviewer approves (RecordReview verdict=approve), THEN the merge lands. The PR review + audit is native workflow, not custom code.

capabilities.name: ReviewInbox
capabilities.note: Where a reviewer approves/rejects/merges a held PullRequest — the write-step sign-off. Approving lets the workflow land the merge.

capabilities.name: ManageRepositories
capabilities.note: Admin maintains the repository registry + config the agent grounds on (default branch, language, git url, owner).

integrations.name: GitHost
integrations.purpose: external Git host (GitHub/GitLab-style REST) the OpenPullRequest service pushes the branch + raises the PR against, and the CodeGenAgent retrieves repo/tree context from as a tool

integrations.name: CiPipeline
integrations.purpose: CI provider (GitHub Actions/Jenkins-style REST) that runs the generated TestSuite and reports the PullRequest BuildStatus back
